positive: A minimalist and stylized depiction of a cosmic voyage. Central focus is a sleek, retro-futuristic stylized astronaut figure, rendered in bold silhouettes of deep indigo and metallic gold, floating amidst swirling nebula clouds and abstract constellations. The scene utilizes strong geometric patterns and celestial mechanics motifs, reminiscent of Art Deco meets space exploration. High contrast, clean lines, flat vector graphic style with slight gradient overlays for depth. Ideal composition for central apparel print. The background nebula should feature rich violets, cyan, and deep sapphire hues. Perfect for screen printing and apparel art, highly detailed yet clean.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signatures, blurry, abstract, noise, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, messy, complex, photorealistic, gradient artifacts
